ogTitle: Conjola vs Connells Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Conjola and Connells Point.
heading: Conjola vs Connells Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Conjola, New South Wales and Connells Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Conjola has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Connells Point (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Conjola or Connells Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Conjola has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Connells Point scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Conjola scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Connells Point scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Conjola or Connells Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Conjola has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
